welcome.name: Welcome
welcome.content:
Discord-RankUP
--------------

Discord-RankUP is a package that allows you to create a rankup system for your discord bot.

It is very easy to use and has a many features to make your rankup system unique!

**Note:** This package is in early development, not all features have been added yet!

## Features

- Lightweight
- Easy to use
- Customizable
- Uses MongoDB
- Built for Discord.Js

## Installation

```bash
npm install discord-rankup
yarn add discord-rankup
pnpm add discord-rankup
```

## Documentation

View the documentation [here](https://discord-rankup.js.org)

## Basic Usage

First you need to initiate the Rankup Client.

```js
const xp = require('discord-rankup');

xp.init("MONGOURL", client);
```

Once that is done, you can start managing the user's XP.

```js
xp.addXP(userID, guildID, xpAmount, emitEvent, cause)
```

- userID: The user's ID
- guildID: The guild's ID
- xpAmount: The amount of XP to add
- emitEvent (optional, true by default): Whether or not to emit the event if the user levels up
- cause (optional): The cause of the XP gain, can be any object, it will be emitted in the event

```js
xp.removeXP(userID, guildID, xpAmount, emitEvent, cause)
```

```js
xp.setXP(userID, guildID, xpAmount, emitEvent, cause)
```

```js
xp.fetchXP(userID, guildID)
```

This will return a promise with the user's XP.


If you want to add the user to the database, you can use the following method.

```js
xp.createMember(userID, guildID)
```

This will create a user in the database, if the user already exists, it will return false.

```js
xp.deleteMember(userID, guildID)
```

This will delete the user from the database, if the user was deleted, it will return true.

## Events

Discord-RankUP has a few events that you can use.

- levelUp: Emitted when a user levels up
- (More to come)

```js
client.on('levelUp', (XPMember, cause) => {
    // Do something
})
```

## Types

```ts
interface XPMember {
    userID: string;
    guildID: string;
    xp: number;
    level: number;
}
```

classes.name: DiscordRankup
classes.description: The main class for DiscordRankup, acts as a manager.

props.name: mongoURL
props.description: The URL to the MongoDB database

methods.name: addXP
methods.description: Add XP to the user and emit the levelUp event if the user levels up

params.name: xp
params.description: The amount of XP to add

params.name: emitEvent
params.description: Whether to emit the levelUp event

params.name: cause
params.description: The cause of the level up, defined when a function affecting the xp is called

methods.returnsDescription: The new amount of user's XP

methods.name: createMember
methods.description: Create a member in the database if they don't exist

methods.name: deleteMember
methods.description: Delete a member from the database
methods.returnsDescription: Whether the member was deleted successfully

methods.name: disconnect
methods.returnsDescription: The promise to disconnect from the database

methods.name: fetch
methods.description: fetch a member from the database

methods.name: getLevelFromXP
methods.description: Returns a level from a specified XP amount

methods.name: init
methods.description: Initialize the package and connect to the database

params.name: url
params.description: The URL to the MongoDB database

params.name: options
params.description: The options to connect to the database

methods.returnsDescription: The promise to connect to the database

methods.name: removeXP
methods.description: Remove XP from the user and emit the levelUp event if the user levels up

params.name: xp
params.description: The amount of XP to remove

params.name: emitEvent
params.description: Whether to emit the levelUp event

params.name: cause
params.description: The cause of the level up, defined when a function affecting the xp is called

methods.returnsDescription: The new amount of user's XP

methods.name: requiredXP
methods.description: Returns the XP required to reach a specified level

methods.name: resetXP
methods.returnsDescription: The new amount of user's XP

methods.name: setXP
methods.description: Set the user's XP and emit the levelUp event if the user levels up

params.name: xp
params.description: The amount of XP to set

params.name: emitEvent
params.description: Whether to emit the levelUp event

params.name: cause
params.description: The cause of the level up, defined when a function affecting the xp is called

methods.returnsDescription: The new amount of user's XP

typedefs.description: The options for a leaderboard query to the database\

typedefs.description: The return value of the getCardData function

typedefs.name: XPMember
